title: Azure Data Factory ETL Pipelines
summary: Designed and automated ETL pipelines in Azure Data Factory for SQL, APIs, and Blob Storage ingestion.

content.value: Data ingestion across multiple sources — on-prem SQL databases, REST APIs, and Azure Blob Storage — was handled by a mix of cron jobs and manual exports. Data freshness SLAs were being missed and pipeline failures went undetected for hours.

Rebuilt all ingestion workflows as parameterized Azure Data Factory pipelines. Each pipeline used dynamic content and metadata-driven patterns so one template handled 10+ source-destination pairs without duplication. Terraform managed all ADF resources, linked services, and trigger schedules.

Implemented monitoring using ADF diagnostic logs shipped to Azure Monitor. Failure alerts fired within 2 minutes of any pipeline error, and auto-retry policies with exponential backoff handled transient API failures gracefully.

Outcome: 12 production pipelines running reliably with 99.8% success rate, data freshness SLAs met consistently, and infrastructure costs reduced by $8k/month by replacing overprovisioned VMs with serverless ADF integration runtimes.
